artPrompt: A single blank glowing memo descends on a shaft of cold cyan light from a distant unseen upper floor, hovering above an empty beige desk while a forest of identical pneumatic tubes and filing towers vanishes into haze around it. The paper pulses faintly arcane, authorless and eternal. Epic-scale film-still framing looking upward into the void, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Memo from Upstairs
text: Draw two cards. Per the attached memo, you must then forward one of them to a colleague (put a card from your hand on top of your library).
flavorText: "Re: Re: Re: FWD: Re: Per my last memo." Nobody knows who started the thread.
